candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related depreciation line shown separately from the already selected COGS component rows ('Cost of Revenues - other' and 'Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue'), so it should be added separately.
Appears to be a broader summary depreciation row, not specifically tied to COGS; using the explicit COGS-specific depreciation row avoids double counting.
Separate operating amortisation line exists, but it is not explicitly assigned to COGS and should not be added to COGS without clear bucket attribution.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS-specific D&A row only. Did not use broad 'Depreciation' or 'Amortisation' rows because they are not clearly COGS-specific and could overlap with other operating buckets.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related depreciation line shown separately from the already selected XSGA component rows ('Sales and marketing costs', 'Administrative costs - other', and 'Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses'), so it should be added separately.
Appears to be a broader summary depreciation row, not specifically tied to SG&A; using the explicit SG&A-specific depreciation row avoids double counting.
Separate operating amortisation line exists, but it is not explicitly assigned to SG&A or R&D in the excerpt; adding it to XSGA would be uncertain and risks misclassification.

variables.notes: MANUALLY CORRECTED. Selected the explicit SG&A-specific depreciation row only. XRD is empty and no explicit R&D amortisation row is visible, so no R&D-related D&A is added. Broad 'Depreciation' and 'Amortisation' rows were excluded to avoid double counting and unclear bucket allocation.
